canonical_name: Signal Transducer and Activator of Transcription 3
step_rationale: IL-10 responsive transcription factor; anti-inflammatory pathway regulator; suppresses plaque inflammation and endothelial dysfunction.
mechanism: STAT3 activation by IL-10 restrains macrophage-driven plaque inflammation and vascular endothelial activation, reducing atherosclerotic destabilization.

references.title: A novel anti-inflammatory role links the CARS2 locus to protection from coronary artery disease.

microRNA-155 Is Decreased During Atherosclerosis Regression and Is Increased in Urinary Extracellular Vesicles During Atherosclerosis Progression.
